meta.description:
Polls cloudflared's /metrics endpoint (Prometheus text format) and reports tunnel-connection health. Cron: hourly (silent when healthy — only posts on DOWN transitions). Webhook: `/webhook/cloudflared-status` — forces a post regardless of state (use as a manual on-demand health check). Requires PLAUSIBLE_… wait no — requires CLOUDFLARED_HOST env var on n8n CT (defaults to 'cloudflared' MagicDNS name). Any stack that composes `cloudflared` can enable this — currently exercised by creator-studio.

Caveat: 'silent when healthy' isn't a full td-health-style heartbeat here. Long silences after a legitimate DOWN transition can be hard to distinguish from n8n-cron-not-firing. Consider adding a dedicated healthcheck cadence + state file if this becomes a false-negative source.
